category_sources: Official repository README describes go-camo as a Go version of a camo server that proxies images over SSL/TLS.
source_facts.description says it is a secure image proxy server.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses the name go-camo.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README documents how go-camo works, installation, running, configuration, and security.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/cactus/go-camo; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README describes proxying non-secure images over SSL/TLS and HMAC-signed URLs.
source_facts.description identifies a secure image proxy server.
